query:
-- 先查詢測試相關的 ID
SELECT 'Test Workers:' as category, COUNT(*) as count FROM workers 
WHERE name LIKE '%測試%' OR name LIKE '%TEST%' OR name LIKE '%[測試]%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Test Clients:', COUNT(*) FROM clients 
WHERE name LIKE '%測試%' OR name LIKE '%TEST%' OR name LIKE '%[測試]%';
